description_long: This handcart features a robust wooden frame with four large spoked wheels, providing stability and ease of movement. The load platform is flat and solid, bordered by vertical wooden slats on the sides to secure cargo. Two large, rounded wooden barrels are positioned on the platform, suggesting the cart is used for transporting heavy or bulky goods. The front of the cart extends into a pair of long wooden handles, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The wheels are reinforced with metal rims, enhancing durability for urban surfaces. The overall construction is utilitarian, with a rustic finish and visible wood grain patterns.
description: A sturdy wooden handcart with four spoked wheels, side rails, and two large barrels on a flat platform, featuring long handles for manual transport.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cart, both barrels, and all four wheels with visible side rails and handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two barrels side by side, the width of the platform, and the front ends of the wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the barrels, wheels, and the extended handles.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the barrels, the rear platform, and the ends of the side rails.
